name: Manteclaw Agent Utilities
description: Production-grade Python utilities for AI agent operations: self-healing API executor with circuit breaker, proactive delta monitor for state-change-only alerting, and lock-free cross-subagent orchestrator.
author: manteclaw

skills.name: Self-Healing API Executor
skills.description: Drop-in retry wrapper with circuit breaker, exponential backoff, full jitter, dead letter queue. Production-grade resilience for flaky APIs.

skills.name: Proactive Delta Monitor
skills.description: Alerts only when state CHANGES. Eliminates noise from agent monitoring. JSON-safe delta detection with pre-built handlers for balances, bounties, tasks.

skills.name: Cross-Subagent Orchestrator
skills.description: Lock-free state sharing between parallel subagents. Atomic JSON writes, deduplication, aggregate status without polling.
